mapper.insert: INSERT INTO itinerary(name, owner, collaborators, strategy, transport_mode, notes, updated_at) VALUES(#{name}, #{owner}, #{collaborators}, #{strategy}, #{transportMode}, #{notes}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE itinerary SET name = #{name}, owner = #{owner}, collaborators = #{collaborators}, strategy = #{strategy}, transport_mode = #{transportMode}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
